classObjective: Recognize and explain special solution sets such as 'no solution' and 'all real numbers' and graph the solution set including solutions with fractions and decimals.
workedExamples: 6-2, Example 3 — Solve and Graph Multi-Step Inequalities (continued)
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: when variable terms cancel (always-true vs. never-true); 'no solution' and 'all real numbers' identification; fractional/decimals solutions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice recognizing and explaining special solution sets and solving inequalities with fractions/decimals
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying special solution cases and solving inequalities with various number types
assessment: Exit ticket: solve 5(x - 2) >= 5x - 10 and describe the solution set
capReflection: How can you determine if an inequality has no solution or all real numbers as a solution before fully solving it?
